user.title: Connect to your Bose SoundTouch
user.description:
Enter the IP address of your Bose SoundTouch device.

Optionally enter a Bose app key (free from {app_key_url}) to enable TTS notifications on all SoundTouch devices.

zeroconf_confirm.title: Discovered Bose SoundTouch
zeroconf_confirm.description:
Do you want to add the Bose SoundTouch device **{name}** found at `{host}`?

You can add a Bose app key later via the Configure button to enable TTS notifications.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Bose SoundTouch
reconfigure.description: Update the connection settings for your Bose SoundTouch device.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the device. Please check the IP address and ensure the device is on.
error.unknown: Unexpected error occurred. Please check the logs.

abort.already_configured: This SoundTouch device is already configured.
abort.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the discovered device.

init.title: SoundTouch Options
init.description: Add a Bose app key (free from {app_key_url}) to enable TTS notifications on all SoundTouch devices including the SoundTouch 300.

play_preset.name: Play Preset
play_preset.description: Play a stored preset on the SoundTouch device.

set_bass.name: Set Bass
set_bass.description: Adjust the bass level on the SoundTouch device.

bass_level.name: Bass Level
bass_level.description: The bass level to set (-9 to 9).

create_zone.name: Create Zone
create_zone.description: Create a multi-room zone with this device as the master.

master.name: Master Device ID
master.description: The device ID of the master speaker.

slaves.name: Slave Device IDs
slaves.description: A list of device IDs to add as zone slaves.

add_zone_slave.name: Add Zone Slave
add_zone_slave.description: Add a speaker to the current multi-room zone.

slaves.name: Slave Device IDs
slaves.description: A list of device IDs to add to the zone.

remove_zone_slave.name: Remove Zone Slave
remove_zone_slave.description: Remove a speaker from the current multi-room zone.

slaves.name: Slave Device IDs
slaves.description: A list of device IDs to remove from the zone.

play_everywhere.name: Play Everywhere
play_everywhere.description: Set this device as the zone master and add all other SoundTouch devices as slaves.

thumbs_up.name: Thumbs Up
thumbs_up.description: Send a 'like' signal for the currently playing track (supported on Pandora, etc.).

thumbs_down.name: Thumbs Down
thumbs_down.description: Send a 'dislike' signal for the currently playing track.

remove_favorite.name: Remove from Favorites
remove_favorite.description: Remove the currently playing track from favorites.
